subcodes.first_line: O My Name! By My might, My grandeur and My majesty, in that moment when I gaze upon thee, I behold no fault [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی فبعزی و عظمتی و کبریائی حین الذی اکون ناظرا الیک لا اری ذا خطاء
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
